caption: A wide shot shows a sports stadium scoreboard displaying the results of a soccer match between two teams, identified by their logos. The scoreboard is predominantly red and white, showing a score of "0-2". The timer is stopped at "45:00", and the text "TIEMPO EXTRA +2" is visible. Goal scorers are listed as "9' F. MENDY" and "15' BENZEMA". The logos for "LaLiga Santander" and "WINAMAX" appear on the screen, along with the text "CAJA RURAL GRANADA". Below the main screen, smaller text reads "NUEVO LOS CARMENES". The stadium seats in the foreground are red and appear mostly empty. Throughout the sequence, the scene remains static with no movement or changes in the display or the surrounding environment, maintaining a consistent view of the scoreboard against the backdrop of the stadium.
